objective: Create a durable real-sample operations pack that tells the operator exactly how to place a provider MARKET sample, attach license evidence, rerun V3.80 and V3.82, and only then run controlled V3.78 validation without copying raw data, writing the target source, or executing downstream model work.
forbidden: Do not copy, move, or edit raw provider samples.
Do not execute V3.78, V3.53, label generation, portfolio validation, NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or model promotion outputs.
acceptance_criteria: Operations manual, license evidence template, license status template, command runbook, and checklist are written.
All command runbook rows have may_execute_now=false.
No raw sample, real license status file, target CSV, labels, portfolio result, or model-promotion output is produced.
failure_conditions: The incoming sample directory is created by this task.
Any raw sample is copied or modified by this task.
The real license_review_status.csv is written by this task.
The official target source is written by this task.
Any downstream validation, label, portfolio, or promotion command is executed.
quality_gates: agent_run_manifest.json satisfies the manifest required field schema.
Output columns contain no forbidden performance or promotion fields.
Secret leak scan returns zero paths.
next_handoff: When a real provider sample is available, follow real_sample_ops_manual.md: run V3.80 once for hash, manually fill license review evidence, rerun V3.80, rerun V3.82, then run the generated controlled V3.78 command only if eligible.
